flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Kankakee Community College fell 16% between 2006 and 2009 (29.9% → 25.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Kankakee Community College fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (66.7% → 57.0%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Kankakee Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.7% → 0.0%).
